turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
My refrigerator isn't cooling and I think something's wrong inside — can I send a photo?
Absolutely — what email should I send the upload link to?
Let me read that back: d-m-a-r-t-i-n-e-z-9-9 at gmail dot com — is that right?
Great, I've sent the upload link — take a photo whenever you're ready.

symptoms.description: not cooling, something looks wrong inside
